sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23366" key="damasa/ndra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰμᾰσ-άνδρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23366.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">subduer of men,</tr_> of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Mag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
